note: Per-rule verdicts for subset.lydrc over subset.gds. `reticle_count` is the exact DrcEngine violation count (asserted by tests/lydrc_engine.rs). `fired` is the layout-level verdict (a rule reports >=1 violation) that both reticle-drc and KLayout must agree on; raw marker counts differ by tool because KLayout emits edge-pair markers while the engine emits one violation per offending shape or pair.
